# CANON REFERENCE DOCUMENT

## The Drowned God's Child — The Crimson Covenant Chronicles

---

## SECTION 1: CHARACTER FACTS

### 1.1 Vera Drowned (Codename: Salt-Hand)

**Full Name:** Vera Drowned  
**Codename:** Salt-Hand  
**Current Age:** 37 (appears late 40s)  
**Birth Year:** Year 258  

**Physical Description:**
- Frame: Wiry and compact, built for efficiency
- Hair: Silver-streaked (accelerated graying from blood magic use)
- Skin: Lined, weathered
- Eyes: Pale gray (lost color from blood magic)
- Distinguishing Mark: Ritual scar across left palm from first Bloodwright working (Year 271, age 13)
- Tattoo: Crimson drop behind left ear (Blooded mark); keeps hair longer to conceal it
- Feet: Bare (uncomfortable wearing shoes)
- Weapons: Short blade in belt, iron dagger in left boot
- Blood Magic Visual: Veins become temporarily visible beneath skin when using abilities

**Personality Traits Affecting Plot:**
- Speaks in fragments; comfortable with silence
- Short, direct sentences; no flourishes
- Controlled voice; emotions rarely shown
- Uses Covenant death references instead of swearing by the Drowned God ("When I'm dead," "before you drown")
- Asks precise questions: who, where, when. Answers how/why herself.
- Compartmentalizes; doesn't process what she feels until later
- Trained to notice everything; old instincts prevent showing awareness

**Knowledge Boundaries:**
- DOES know: Covenant operations, assassination tradecraft, blood magic
- DOES NOT know: Where she hid the evidence of the breeding program (blood-stained document in salt-vault)
- DOES know: Covenant cannot access what she hid
- DOES NOT know: Full extent of breeding program scope (only saw part of it)

**Relationships:**
- Mother: Drowned in Saltwaste flooding when Vera was 7 (Year 265)
- Father: Not mentioned
- Kael Drowned-Voss: Former blood-oath sibling, former partner, possibly more; complicated history
- Mira: Daughter, age 5; entire axis of motivation

**Background Milestones:**
- Year 265 (age 7): Mother drowned during Saltwaste flooding
- Year 271 (age 13): Covenant discovered Vessel-class potential; recruited from refugee camps; first Bloodwright working scar
- Year 276-291 (ages 18-33): Active service as Covenant assassin; accumulated 37 confirmed kills
- Year 291 (age 33): Retired after Mira's birth; secured blood-contract waiving service in exchange for exile

---

### 1.2 Mira

**Full Name:** Mira (surname not established)  
**Current Age:** 5  
**Birth Year:** Year 290  

**Physical Description:**
- Vessel-class bloodforge potential demonstrated spontaneously at age 4
- Can feel own blood moving when submerged
- Can hold breath without chest burning (compared to other children)
- Possesses small polished shell gift from Sister Brine (kept after kidnapping)

**Personality Traits Affecting Plot:**
- Curious and brave
- Questioning; asks many questions
- Knows something is wrong with mother's past
- Could always tell when Vera had nightmares

**Knowledge Boundaries:**
- DOES know: Something is wrong/hidden about mother
- DOES NOT know: What mother was; what Covenant is; what she herself is (Vessel-class)
- Left shell deliberately on pillow (Chapter 11 significance)

---

### 1.3 Kael Drowned-Voss

**Full Name:** Kael Drowned-Voss  
**Age:** Not specified; similar age to Vera  

**Physical Description:**
- Distinguished by old scar on chin
- Ferry operator; works dock in Lower Arches

**Personality Traits Affecting Plot:**
- Morally compromised but not villainous
- Tries to warn Vera; fails due to circumstances
- Guilt-ridden; carries burden of coercion

**Knowledge Boundaries:**
- DOES know: Covenant surveillance of Vera; family is hostage; information about Covenant operations
- DOES NOT know: Full scope of what Vera took/smuggled out
- Was coerced into betraying Vera four years ago (family held hostage by Covenant)

**Relationships:**
- Sister: Has children; does not know children are hostages
- Vera: Blood-oath sibling, former partner; current reluctant ally
- Bond with Vera: Blood-oath allows Vera to sense his general location and physical state

**Background:**
- Used safehouse with Vera in Undercroft (currently using it alone)
- Wrote unsent letter to Vera explaining coercion; kept in salt-vault
- Recognized Vera in Chapter 1 but said nothing

---

### 1.4 Vex Morreth

**Full Name:** Vex Morreth  
**Title:** Primarch of the Crimson Covenant  

**Background:**
- Former dockworker who rose through ranks
- Considered most ruthless killer in Covenant history
- Junior Bloodlord during Pale Tower Incident (Year 289)
- Killed previous Primarch Cressa Voidhand in single combat
- Took control establishing current leadership structure

**Current Role:**
- Rules absolutely
- Selected by council of five Bloodlords
- Driving cell consolidation (merging all cells into single command)
- Removing rivals

---

### 1.5 Elder Salthorn

**Full Name:** Elder Salthorn  
**Title:** Keeper of the Well (current)  

**Affiliation:** Tidewell Monastery  
**Role:** Spiritual authority; controls temple excommunication (death sentence in this world)

**Personality:**
- Maintains strict neutrality
- Young priestesses under him show increasing sympathy for Flotilla refugees

**Family:** Niece is Sister Brine

---

### 1.6 Sister Brine

**Full Name:** Not provided  
**Title:** Sister Brine  
**Role:** Young priestess at Tidewell Monastery  

**Affiliations:**
- Tidewell Monastery (Elder Salthorn is uncle)
- Sympathizes with refugees

**Knowledge Boundaries:**
- Gave Mira shell gift from monastery stores
- Said "For the child who loves the water" to Mira

---

### 1.7 Vellum

**Title:** Blood-broker  
**Location:** Gutter Market, oldest stall  

**Description:**
- Wizened (survived six Primarchs)
- Has seen everything

**Knowledge Boundaries:**
- DOES know: Covenant operations, where Mira is held, contract terms
- Provided contracts to Vera
- Offered Vera choice: three Bloodwright contracts or Mira becomes Vessel
- Blood-signed contract produced; Vera cut palm and signed in blood

---

### 1.8 Salt

**Title:** Apothecary  
**Location:** Undercroft apothecary district  

**Background:**
- Has operated apothecary for years
- Looks older but unchanged from Vera's memory
- Daughter's life saved by Vera during Saltwaste crisis

**Knowledge Boundaries:**
- DOES know: Vera's past; that Vera was always going to be a mother
- Remembers Vera "used to practice" being a mother
- Provided herbs for Mira's fever plus small vial; refused payment

---

### 1.9 Saltwell

**Title:** Bloodlord  
**Affiliation:** Crimson Covenant  

**Background:**
- Old enemy of Vera from her active years
- Oversees Vessel transfers (movement of children from breeding facility to Pale Tower)
- Controls secondary facility where Mira is held
- Scheduled Mira's transfer to Pale Tower
- Subject of Covenant consolidation (Covenant wants him eliminated)
- Subject of Chapter 6 contract (Vera must kill him)

**Current Status:**
- Was at Pale Tower secondary entrance
- Encounter with Vera ends in his death

---

### 1.10 Other Named Characters

| Name | Title/Role | Notes |
|------|-----------|-------|
| Cressa Voidhand | Previous Primarch | Assassinated Year 289; tried to monopolize tideglass |
| Morreth the First | Covenant Founder | Dockworker who discovered blood manipulation; Year 47 |
| Harlan Moss | Cedarhold timber merchant | Contract target (Chapter 6); selling tideglass-location intel to Dockward |
| Aldric Voss | Dockward Council member | Contract target (Chapter 9); genuinely trying to clean up corruption |
| Fen | Boy at monastery | Lost breath-holding contest to Mira |

---

## SECTION 2: POLITICAL FACTS

### 2.1 Power Structure

**The Tripartite Power (Drowned Reaches):**

1. **Dockward Council**
   - Governs: Surface affairs (taxation, public works, disputes)
   - Structure: Elected by property owners (oligarchic)
   - Controls: Harbor Authority (only legal port), fees from all shipping
   - Vulnerable to:
